audit_scope: SOCELLE-WEB/src/ — design token violations, Sentry removal, useEffect+supabase violations

pro_tokens.note: Raw grep for 'pro-|pro_' catches non-Tailwind strings: plan IDs (pro_monthly, pro_only), HTML element IDs (pro-search, pro-backbar), DB column names (pro_products, pro_price, allow_pro_orders, selected_pro_ids), comments referencing pro-* policy, database.types.ts generated fields. No 'pro-*' entries exist in tailwind.config.js — they are NOT defined as Tailwind tokens. No className attribute contains a pro-[token] Tailwind class. The 2,027 figure from CLAUDE.md §4 refers to a prior audit state; current repo has 87 raw grep hits of which 0 are Tailwind CSS utility classes.

top_classes.type: HTML element id attribute — NOT a Tailwind token
signal_key string in mockSignals.ts — NOT a Tailwind token

pro_tokens.status: PASS — 0 pro-* Tailwind CSS tokens in use. tailwind.config.js defines NO pro-* color entries.

brand_star.scope: Portal-scoped tokens defined in tailwind.config.js lines 33-47 under comment '// Legacy semantic tokens (portals)'. Used in: index.css, StatCard, Button, EmptyState, UpgradeGate. NOT present in src/pages/public/.
brand_star.status: FAIL — 19 usages of brand-* Tailwind tokens exist. These are legacy tokens defined in tailwind.config.js portals scope. They must be migrated to Pearl Mineral V2 equivalents (accent-soft, mn.surface, etc.) per CLAUDE.md §4 item 2 and launch gate §19.

intel_star.scope: Defined in tailwind.config.js lines 49-58 under '// Intelligence layer (portal dashboards)'. Used in GlowBadge, DarkPanel, business/Dashboard, business/PortalHome, business/PlanResults, business/BrandDetail, business/MarketingAnalytics, business/BenchmarkDashboard.
intel_star.status: FAIL — 30 usages of intel-* Tailwind tokens exist. These are banned per CLAUDE.md §6. Must be replaced with Pearl Mineral V2 signal tokens (signal-up, signal-down, signal-warn, accent, graphite).

font_serif.status: PASS — 0 font-serif usages in src/. Confirmed clean.

sentry.note_package_json: No @sentry/react or @sentry/vite-plugin found in package.json. Sentry dependency removal appears complete.

src_references.type: Label string in inventory report UI — references the audit check itself, NOT an actual Sentry import

sentry.status: PASS — Sentry fully removed from package.json, vite.config.ts, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx. Only remaining reference is a label string in AdminInventoryReport.tsx audit UI (line 39), which is the report dashboard displaying this metric — not an actual Sentry usage.

useeffect_supabase_violations.nature: Cart initialization side-effect (ensureWishlist). Comment on line 3 acknowledges retained useEffect for DB write side-effect. supabase.from calls are mutations (insert/delete), not SELECT fetches. NEVER MODIFY per CLAUDE.md §B.
useeffect_supabase_violations.priority: LOW — mutations only, no SELECT fetch pattern, protected file

useeffect_supabase_violations.nature: Cart initialization side-effect. Comment on line 3 acknowledges retained useEffect. supabase.from on line 33 is inside async init function (mutation context). NEVER MODIFY per CLAUDE.md §B.
Scheduling side-effect. Comment on line 4 acknowledges retained useEffect for operator enrichment scheduling. supabase.from is a SELECT inside a scheduled function.
useeffect_supabase_violations.priority: MEDIUM — needs migration to useQuery for the SELECT

useeffect_supabase_violations.nature: useEffect on lines 124+139 appear to be side effects (form sync). supabase.from on 195+199 are mutations (update/insert) inside event handlers — not inside useEffect. File also uses useQuery (lines 105, 561). True violation needs confirmation of whether useEffect fetches from supabase directly.
useeffect_supabase_violations.priority: MEDIUM — in CLAUDE.md §4 known list, needs targeted review

useeffect_supabase_violations.nature: supabase.from on line 321 is inside a useQuery queryFn (line 311 confirms useQuery wraps it). useEffect on line 363 is a side effect (not a fetch). File has useQuery as primary data fetching pattern.
useeffect_supabase_violations.priority: LOW — supabase.from is inside useQuery, useEffect is a separate side effect — likely NOT a true violation

useeffect_supabase_violations.nature: supabase.from on 336/337 are slug-uniqueness checks in validation function. Lines 1776/1777 are inside useQuery queryFn. useEffect on 1134 is a side-effect. File extensively uses useQuery. Likely NOT a true violation — supabase.from calls are inside useQuery or validation helpers.
useEffect on line 78 is a side-effect. supabase.from on 165/168 are mutations (update/insert) inside event handlers. File also uses useQuery (line 83). Not a raw data-fetch violation.
useeffect_supabase_violations.priority: LOW — mutations only, not in useEffect

true_violations_requiring_migration: src/lib/enrichment/useEnrichment.ts — SELECT inside scheduling useEffect should use useQuery

failures: 19 brand-* Tailwind token usages remain (brand-border, brand-surface, brand-surface-alt etc.) in components and index.css
30 intel-* Tailwind token usages remain (intel-up, intel-down, intel-accent, intel-dark etc.) in portal pages and UI components
passes: 0 pro-* Tailwind CSS token usages (no pro-* defined in tailwind.config.js)
token-drift-scanner.evidence: tailwind.config.js lines 33-58 define brand-* and intel-* as legacy portal-scoped tokens. 19+30=49 total banned token usages across src/components/ and src/pages/business/

dependency-scanner.evidence: No @sentry/react, @sentry/vite-plugin in package.json. No Sentry.init() in main.tsx or App.tsx. No Sentry imports in src/. No sentryVitePlugin in vite.config.ts.

failures: src/lib/enrichment/useEnrichment.ts — useEffect with supabase.from SELECT (scheduling hook, 1 confirmed violation)
passes: useWishlist.ts and useShopCart.ts: protected NEVER MODIFY files, useEffect is for mutation side-effects not SELECT fetches
AdminIngredientsHub.tsx, BrandAdminEditor.tsx, IntelligenceReport.tsx, Products.tsx: supabase.from calls are inside useQuery queryFns or mutation event handlers — not raw useEffect fetches
dev-best-practice-checker.evidence: 6 files flagged by grep; only 1 confirmed true SELECT-in-useEffect violation (useEnrichment.ts). Remaining 5 use supabase.from inside useQuery or for mutations.

30 intel-* Tailwind tokens in use (intel-up, intel-down, intel-accent, intel-dark) — must migrate to signal-up, signal-down, signal-warn, accent
